headline: Tractor Supply (TSCO) Stock Valuation Check After A Steep Yearlong Decline
summary: Tractor Supply (TSCO) has drawn investor attention after a period where the stock declined about 38% year to date and roughly 38% over the past year, despite positive reported revenue and net income growth. See our latest analysis for Tractor Supply. Despite a recent 7 day share price return of 4.94% and a 30 day share price return of 4.69%, the stock is still down 33.85% over 90 days and the 1 year total shareholder return is down 38.10%. This indicates sentiment has weakened despite...
